name: Crispin & Lacey — Pokémon Friends
description:
Hello!

Trying something different here, I’m choosing some Pokémon people I saw on some Pokémon cards as inspiration for this bot! This is very different from my usual demihuman bots. You’re a human in this bot.

Please leave feedback in the comments, I really need feedback.

This is an old bot that I made, and I thought I can upload it.
creator: Leland S.
